message:
Command `DESIGN_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

echo "=== Final validation ==="
check() { [ -e "$1" ] && echo "  PASS: $(basename $1)" || echo "  FAIL: $1"; }

echo "-- verification/ --"
check "$DESIGN_ROOT/verification/manifest.yaml"
echo "  scenario count: $(ls $DESIGN_ROOT/verification/scenarios/*.yaml 2>/dev/null | wc -l)"
echo ""
echo "-- Macro placement summary --"
echo "  macro.cfg entries: $(wc -l < $DESIGN_ROOT/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/macro.cfg)"
echo "  (should be 32 for 128KB SRAM)"
echo ""
echo "-- Die geometry from core.def --"
grep DIEAREA "$DESIGN_ROOT/def/core.def" | head -1
echo ""
echo "-- Padframe die geometry --"
grep DIEAREA "$DESIGN_ROOT/def/padframe.def" | head -1
echo ""
echo "-- GDS files --"
ls -lh "$DESIGN_ROOT/gds/"
echo ""
echo "-- Reports --"
ls "$DESIGN_ROOT/reports/"
echo ""
echo "-- Filelist --"
ls "$DESIGN_ROOT/filelists/"` executed with exit code 0.

function.name: execute_bash

content:
=== Final validation ===
-- verification/ --
  PASS: manifest.yaml
  scenario count: 21

-- Macro placement summary --
  macro.cfg entries: 32
  (should be 32 for 128KB SRAM)

-- Die geometry from core.def --
DIEAREA ( 0 0 ) ( 4278670 3778670 ) ;

-- Padframe die geometry --
DIEAREA ( 0 0 ) ( 4700000 4200000 ) ;

-- GDS files --
total 70M
-rw-r--r-- 1 user user  35M May 29 08:58 chip.gds
-rw-r--r-- 1 user user 1.2M May 29 08:58 core.gds
-rw-r--r-- 1 user user  34M May 29 08:58 padframe.gds

-- Reports --
mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_addr_map.csv
mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_compatibility.json
mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_filelist_missing.txt
mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_irq_map.csv
mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_manifest.json
mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_padframe_handoff.json
mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_padframe_handoff.yaml
mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_pinmux_map.csv

-- Filelist --
mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f
